text: Here, I am surrounded by modern architecture and design, both sleek and somewhat sterile. The open space and clean lines evoke a sense of anticipation—a waiting for something to happen or reveal itself. Then, stepping into the R+D exhibition, color and text cascade before my senses, pulling me into a narrative of innovation and experimentation. I feel curious, alert to the dialogue between technology and human experience. But also slightly disoriented by the oblique angles, as if my perspective is momentarily adrift, seeking to understand the purpose and meaning of this curated environment.
